system.description:
At 4th level, the nature of your flame continues to evolve, opening new possibilities. You gain one of the following features:

Mind Flame

You add the psychic and knowledge schools of magic to your fire lord spell list. You gain one spell from each of these schools when you gain this feature, they don’t count toward the number of spells you know.

Once per Long Rest, when you use the @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.0VKJHXDtUHxvSFv0]{Searing Fire} feature, instead of burning, you can choose a number of creatures up to your proficiency bonus which were affected by your spell. They must make a Wisdom Saving Throw (Spell save DC), or they are [[/condition id=confused]] for 1 minute. They make a new saving throw at the end of each of their turns.

Grey Flame

You add the attack and weaponry schools of magic to your fire lord spell list. You gain two spells from these schools when you gain this feature, they don’t count toward the number of spells you know.

When you take the Attack action, you can forgo making one attack to allow a friendly creature within 15ft of you to make an attack instead. If the target can hear or see you, it can use its reaction to either cast a cantrip or make one weapon attack.

Cold Flame

You add the cold and water schools of magic to your fire lord spell list. You gain two spells from these schools when you gain this feature, they don’t count toward the number of spells you know.

Once per Long Rest, when you use the @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.0VKJHXDtUHxvSFv0]{Searing Fire} feature, instead of burning, you can choose a number of creatures up to your proficiency bonus which were affected by your spell. They must make a Strength Saving Throw (Spell save DC), or be [[/condition id=restrained]] for 1 minute. They make a new saving throw at the end of each of their turns.

Toxic Flame

You add the acid and poison schools of magic to your fire lord spell list. You gain two spells from these schools when you gain this feature, they don’t count toward the number of spells you know.

Once per Long Rest, when you use the @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.0VKJHXDtUHxvSFv0]{Searing Fire} feature, instead of burning, you can choose a number of creatures up to your proficiency bonus which were affected by your spell. They make a Constitution Saving Throw (Spell save DC), or are [[/condition id=poisoned]] for 1 minute. They make a new saving throw at the end of each of their turns.

Necrosis Flame

You add the necrotic and evil schools of magic to your fire lord spell list. You gain two spells from these schools when you gain this feature, they don’t count toward the number of spells you know.

Once per Long Rest, when you use the @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.0VKJHXDtUHxvSFv0]{Searing Fire} feature, instead of burning, you can choose a number of creatures up to your proficiency bonus which were affected by your spell. They must make an Intelligence Saving Throw (Spell save DC), or be [[/condition id=frightened]] for 1 minute. They make a new saving throw at the end of each of their turns.

Holy Flame

You add the radiant and good schools of magic to your fire lord spell list. You gain two spells from these schools when you gain this feature, they don’t count toward the number of spells you know.

Once per Long Rest, when you use the @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.0VKJHXDtUHxvSFv0]{Searing Fire} feature, instead of burning, you can choose a number of undead creatures up to twice your proficiency bonus which were affected by your spell. They make a Charisma Saving Throw (Spell save DC), or they are turned (as per the Cleric feature, @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.zhuf06durl8bnmh3]{Turn Undead}) for 1 minute. They make a new saving throw at the end of each of their turns.

Electric Flame

You add the lightning and thunder schools of magic to your fire lord spell list. You gain two spells from these schools when you gain this feature, they don’t count toward the number of spells you know.

Once per Long Rest, when you use the @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.0VKJHXDtUHxvSFv0]{Searing Fire} feature, instead of burning, you can choose a number of creatures up to your proficiency bonus which were affected by your spell. They make a Constitution Saving Throw (Spell save DC), or they are [[/condition id=rattled]] for 1 minute. They make a new saving throw at the end of each of their turns. If they fail their initial saving throw by 5 or more, they are [[/condition id=paralyzed]] instead of rattled.
